no: not compatible with the Multistronghold mods (ie: TA's) or any mod that directly changes the same parts of the game like Hidden Adventure's "A bard for the Bard Stronghold" [The Gibberlings Three Anniversary Mod placeholder] Adventures in Papperland Not really a quest, it's just the Beatles screwing around the bard stronghold. Funny, but not much more to it.
sum: This mod adds a few amusing dialogs with 4 musicians named "The Beatles".

co.no: Surreal adventure in a magical papercraft world.
